_source: fetched from official OIDC discovery document at https://developer.api.intuit.com/.well-known/openid_configuration
_note: Intuit publishes a real OIDC discovery document. Supports response_type=code only. Token auth methods: client_secret_post and client_secret_basic. ID tokens signed with RS256. QuickBooks API base URL requires appending /company/{realmId}/ for most operations.
